title: Harden start/update logic (start gating + tx_id validation)
acceptance_criteria: `ops_start_task` rejects new starts when a different transaction is already active, with a clear error.
`ops_start_task` allows re-entry only when it matches the current active transaction.
`ops_update_task` requires a matching `tx_id` and returns a clear error on mismatch.

steps.description: Locate the transaction start/update handlers and their current validation rules.
Add gating for start requests when another active transaction exists.
Enforce `tx_id` matching for updates with explicit error messaging.
Document expected behavior and edge cases in the ticket summary.

notes: Keep changes minimal and localized to start/update validation logic.
Error messages should be explicit about the active transaction and expected tx_id.
